personality_one_liner: A cinematic, expensive, and deeply immersive digital vitrine where dark ink, gold accents, and elegant typography sell the allure of luxury fragrances.

spacing.rule: Generous vertical breathing room for luxury feel, let typography and empty dark space frame the content.

do's: Use glassmorphism for bottom tab bar, floating suggestion action, and modal scrims.
Apply translucent tinted base beneath glass to ensure text readability over dark imagery.
Use glass headers for smooth scroll fades.
dont's: Never blur body text regions or form fields.
Do not use heavy drop shadows; replace them with soft blur or flat tonal elevation.

screens.name: Vitrine
screens.purpose: Public showcase displaying the perfume catalog, families, and detailed fragrance cards.

states.loading: Centered minimalist spinner with a subtle 'Preparando as fragrâncias...' text.
states.empty: No perfumes found illustration with a button to clear filters.
states.error: Elegant error message asking the user to reconnect.

screens.layout: Hero image banner with a vertical gradient scrim fading to 'surface'. Search bar and horizontal scrollable filter chips directly beneath. Vertical list of perfume cards. Each card must have a vertical 3-color pyramid bar on the left edge. A floating action button (FAB) for 'Sugestões' positioned above a hidden 'Ateliê' entry trigger.

screens.name: Ateliê Login

states.error: Inline rust red text for invalid credentials.

screens.layout: Bottom sheet layout, never full screen. Standard single-column form (user/password) with an elegant 'Entrar' button.

screens.name: Ateliê Dashboard
screens.purpose: High-level overview of the atelier's operations.

states.empty: Zero state with prompt to add first perfume.

screens.layout: Four 2-column grid stat cards at the top. 'Últimos Pedidos' list underneath with status pills showing current operations. Use 'SpaceMono' for metric values.

screens.name: Catálogo
screens.purpose: CRUD interface for the owner to manage the perfume collection.

states.empty: Minimalist dark empty room image, 'Nenhum perfume no catálogo'.

screens.layout: List of perfumes identical in style to Vitrine but with Edit/Delete icon actions. A FAB 'Adicionar' uses a bottom sheet to open a creation form (with color pickers or numeric inputs for the top/heart/base pyramid).

screens.name: Estoque
screens.purpose: Manage stock levels and view recent movements (in/out).
screens.layout: Split view or toggle between 'Níveis Atuais' and 'Movimentações'. Uses success (sage) for IN and warning (rust/gold) for OUT movements.

screens.name: Pedidos & Opiniões
screens.layout: Standard vertical list with prominent status pills (pendente/preparando/enviado/entregue/cancelado) in Pedidos, and Phosphor star icons in Opiniões.

vitrine_hero.alt: Abstract dynamic dark gold sculpture representing luxury perfume essence

perfume_placeholder.alt: Clear glass luxury perfume bottle against a dark moody background

empty_state_dark.alt: Minimalist dark empty room illuminated by a single warm light

instructions_to_main_agent: Design personality is 'Glass / Luxe DARK'. Strict adherence to the provided color palette: Ink (#15130F) background, Gold (#C7A25C) accents. Do not use generic blues, indigos, or purples.
Typography: Use 'Fraunces' (weight 400 or 500 max) for Display headers and titles. Use 'Manrope' for body text. Use 'SpaceMono' specifically for prices, numeric stats, and numbering (e.g., 'Nº 001').

Signature Element: On the perfume cards in both the Vitrine and Catálogo, implement the vertical 3-color pyramid bar on the left edge. The bar should smoothly divide or stack the three custom colors: topNote (#C9A227), heartNote (#C06E7E), and baseNote (#8A6438).

For all background or hero images, ensure a gradient scrim (expo-linear-gradient) is applied. The scrim must fade from transparent (top) to at least 70% 'surfaceInverse' or 'surface' (bottom) to guarantee text contrast. Use absolute positioning.

The Ateliê mode is completely hidden from the public Vitrine. Provide a discreet access point (e.g., long-pressing the header or a small subtle icon button in the footer) that triggers the 'Ateliê Login' bottom sheet.
All form creations (CRUD for Perfumes, Stock movements) must open in a '@gorhom/bottom-sheet' modal, not full-screen navigation.
Vitrine Actions: Each perfume card in the public Vitrine must have actions to 'Buy' (request purchase) and 'Suggestion'. No WhatsApp integration for now.
Status Pills: Ensure status pills map semantically to colors: Pendente (warning), Enviado/Entregue (success), Cancelado (error).
Make sure the active tab indicator or active chips use 'brandPrimary' with a subtle elevated appearance.
Do NOT use emoji anywhere. Use Phosphor icons (filled/outlined depending on state).
Use Haptics for all primary buttons, tab switches, and bottom sheet opening.
